title: Comments and requests: Diabetes in Canada: Facts and figures from a public health perspective - Canada.ca
content:
## Comments and requests: Diabetes in Canada: Facts and figures from a public health perspective

## Comments and requests
To obtain hard copies or to submit comments about this report, please contact:
Chronic Disease Surveillance and Monitoring Division Centre for Chronic Disease Prevention and Control 785 Carling Avenue, AL: 6806B Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9 Canada E-mail: chronic.publications.chronique@phac-aspc.gc.ca
